description: Perform a Chi-Square Goodness of Fit test on the 'passengerClass' variable from the dataset at '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/TitanicSurvival.csv' to determine if passenger classes were equally distributed. Ensure 'passengerClass' is treated as a nominal variable and include expected counts in the analysis. Save the analysis result to '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/TitanicGoF.omv'.
